let Declaration = require('../declaration') let flexSpec = require('./flex-spec') class Flex extends Declaration { /** * Return property name by final spec */ normalize() { return 'flex' } /** * Return flex property for 2009 and 2012 specs */ prefixed(prop, prefix) { let spec ;[spec, prefix] = flexSpec(prefix) if (spec === 2009) { return prefix + 'box-flex' } if (spec === 2012) { return prefix + 'flex-positive' } return super.prefixed(prop, prefix) } } Flex.names = ['flex-grow', 'flex-positive'] module.exports = Flex
